name: Curriculum Vitae
descs:
Turn End: allies with 7+ ([Charge] Count + 'Unique Charge') gain 1 [Agility] next turn.

If the ally has Gloom Affinity Skills, gain 2 [Agility] and 1 [ResultEnhancement] next turn instead.

Turn End: allies with 7+ ([Charge] Count + 'Unique Charge') gain 2 [Agility] next turn.

If the ally has Gloom Affinity Skills, gain 3 [Agility] and 1 [ResultEnhancement] next turn instead.

Turn End: allies with 7+ ([Charge] Count + 'Unique Charge') gain 3 [Agility] next turn.

If the ally has Gloom Affinity Skills, gain 4 [Agility] and 1 [ResultEnhancement] next turn instead.
